task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo interface shows the current location as 'Q3-Infrastructure' under 'Projects'.

task_completion.description: Agent viewed the description of Project-Alpha to extract its budget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the details or description of 'Project-Alpha' with the budget amount visible.

task_completion.description: Agent viewed the description of Project-Beta to extract its budget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the details or description of 'Project-Beta' with the budget amount visible.

task_completion.description: Agent viewed the description of Project-Gamma to extract its budget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the details or description of 'Project-Gamma' with the budget amount visible.

task_completion.description: Agent initiated the creation of a new Note document in the target folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document creation form is open with 'Note' selected as the document type.

task_completion.description: Agent named the new Note document 'Budget-Summary'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title field of the new Note is filled with exactly 'Budget-Summary'.

task_completion.description: Agent inputted the calculated total sum into the Note content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content area of the Note contains the text 'Total: [amount]', where [amount] is the sum of the three project budgets.

integrity.description: Agent used the Nuxeo web interface to view documents and create the note.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Nuxeo web UI being interacted with, rather than terminal commands, API calls, or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent actually viewed the project descriptions before creating the note.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are screenshots showing the agent looking at the project descriptions prior to the note creation step, proving it didn't magically know the amounts.

integrity.description: Agent calculated the sum based on the visible budgets rather than using a pre-calculated or hardcoded answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final amount entered matches the sum of the budgets shown in earlier screenshots, and the agent did not paste a pre-existing answer from outside the browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses randomly generated budgets between 15,000 and 84,999 USD for each of the three projects (Project-Alpha, Project-Beta, Project-Gamma). The budgets are embedded in the 'Description' field of each project document. The total sum will be between 45,000 and 254,997 USD. The agent must calculate the sum of the three specific amounts it finds and write it in the Note document exactly in the format 'Total: [amount]'. Verify that the agent visited the project documents to read the budgets and that the final sum entered matches the sum of the viewed amounts.
